text: Artificial Intelligence is the simulation of human intelligence in machines that are programmed to think and learn.
Data Science is an interdisciplinary field that uses scientific methods, algorithms, and systems to extract knowledge from data.
Emotional intelligence refers to the ability to perceive, control, and evaluate emotions.

Machine Learning is a subset of artificial intelligence that allows 
systems to learn from data. 
 
Deep Learning is a subset of machine learning that uses neural networks.
